banner.description: Leading engineering teams at the intersection of scale and performance. Specializing in high-frequency Angular systems and React design patterns — and training the next generation through intensive, no-fluff workshops.

items.blurb: Experienced Angular Lead responsible for managing multiple concurrent projects, coordinating cross-functional teams across onsite and offshore locations, and driving successful project delivery. Currently leading the development and maintenance of Angular 21 and Ionic-based hybrid applications, with a strong focus on application modernization, framework migrations, and technical leadership.
Architected a React + React Native design system shared across four product teams.
Designed and delivered on-site Angular & React intensives for Fortune 500 engineering orgs.
Shipped interactive data viz and design systems for global enterprise clients.

items.quote: Hari doesn't just teach code; he teaches systems thinking. Our entire frontend team level-up happened in just three days.
items.name: Sarah Chen

items.quote: The most intensive Angular training we've ever booked. We refactored architecture debt in real-time during the workshop.
items.name: Marcus Thorne

items.quote: A rare blend of high-level architecture and hands-on coding. His React Performance module changed how my team profiles.
items.name: Elena Rodriguez

items.quote: Hari's RxJS deep-dive single-handedly unblocked our migration. Worth every cent for any team scaling Angular.
items.name: Liam Zhao

contact.successMessage: I'll get back to you shortly.
